allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })
PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\ajita\\my-portfolio"; $job = Start-Job { cd "c:\\Users\\ajita\\my-portfolio"; npx vite 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; Receive-Job $job; Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5174" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content | Select-String -Pattern "root|vite" | Select-Object -First 3 } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; \($r.Content | Select-String -Pattern "id=.root"\).Matches[0].Value } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })

PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Write-Output "--- winget available? ---"; $w = Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($w\) { Write-Output "winget: yes" } else { Write-Output "winget: no" })

PowerShell($p = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "Git installed: $\(& $p --version\)" } else { Write-Output "Git not yet installed \(winget still running\)" })
PowerShell($p = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "Git installed: $\(& $p --version\)" } else { Write-Output "Git still installing" })
PowerShell($git = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"; if \(Test-Path $git\) { Write-Output "Git ready: $\(& $git --version\)" } else { Write-Output "Git NOT found yet" })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "winget" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime, @{N='RunMins';E={[math]::Round\(\(\(Get-Date\) - $_.StartTime\).TotalMinutes,1\)}}; Write-Output "---UAC consent prompt?---"; Get-Process -Name "consent","UserAccountControlSettings" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Id)
